title: Spec 06 §8.4 stale row: link-layer destination unsigned
description: spec/06-security.md:81 lists 'Link-layer destination | Changes each hop' as unsigned/relay-mutable, but the frame format (spec/02 §4.1) contains only an END-TO-END Dst Addr (2-8 B compressed destination), and every implementation (C + Python, both trees) signs it. The unsigned-table row describes a per-hop address field that does not exist. Editorial fix: move link dst to the signed table or clarify.
